title: Welcome!
text:
Welcome to the Malone Disturbance Ecology Lab (MDEL)! Here you’ll find various resources designed to help you in setting up your projects and integrating with the lab. There is a lot of content, but you will probably want to check out this landing page, Setup, and Best Practices at the very least.
Please don’t hesitate to reach out if you have any questions or feedback on this website.

title: Welcome!
text:
Directory 🗂️
Main lab website: https://www.malonelab.org/
MDEL GitHub organization: https://github.com/Malone-Disturbance-Ecology-Lab
MDEL DataONE portal: https://search.dataone.org/portals/3107251/About
For help in setting up your new project properly, visit the Setup tab.
For ideas on how to best format your workflow for maximum reproducibility, visit the tabs under Best Practices.
Lastly, check out the tabs under Resources for a list of technical resources, such as tutorials on coding, data publication, synthesis science, website creation, HPC clusters, and more!

title: Welcome!
text:
Lab Policies 📄
Please take a moment to read, review, and sign the lab policies here. Thank you!
